resultList.dtldesc: Hiranandani Queensgate is an upscale residential project located along the prominent Bannerghatta Main Road in Bangalore. Developed by the House of Hiranandani, this project is part of a larger 38-acre township designed to offer a sophisticated lifestyle with a blend of classical architecture and modern amenities. The development provides a serene living environment with meticulously planned green spaces, making it a highly desirable address for families and professionals alike.::::Property Specifications::The project offers a variety of residential configurations, primarily focusing on 2 BHK and 3 BHK apartments. The units are designed with generous proportions, with 2 BHK apartments typically ranging from 1,179 to 1,210 sq. ft. For those requiring more space, the 3 BHK apartments offer super areas between 1,300 and 1,693 sq. ft. These ready-to-move homes are situated within high-rise towers, with many units located on higher floors to provide panoramic views of the city. The interiors are crafted with high-quality materials and follow functional layouts that ensure optimal ventilation and natural light.::::Facilities::Hiranandani Queensgate is equipped with a wide range of premium facilities to cater to the diverse needs of its residents. The project features 16 distinct amenities, including a well-equipped gymnasium, swimming pool, and dedicated play areas for children. Essential services such as 24-hour power backup, advanced security systems with CCTV surveillance, and intercom facilities are provided to ensure a secure and convenient lifestyle. Additionally, the complex includes reserved covered parking, service lifts, and visitor parking areas, all maintained to a high standard.::::Locality::Situated on Bannerghatta Main Road, the project enjoys excellent connectivity to Bangalore's major IT hubs and commercial centres. The locality is well-developed, with proximity to reputed educational institutions, healthcare facilities, and shopping destinations like the Royal Meenakshi Mall. It is well-connected by public transport, with several bus stops and the upcoming metro line enhancing accessibility to other parts of the city. The surrounding neighbourhood offers a vibrant social infrastructure, ensuring that all daily and recreational needs are met within a short distance.

Easy accessibility to major roads and growing infrastructure make this apartment an excellent option for both self use and long term investment.
